---
title: "Samarth Sheth"
subtitle: ""
pagetitle: "Samarth Sheth"
page-layout: article
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <script>document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => document.body.classList.add("page-home"));</script>
---

::: {.home-simple}

::: {.home-text}
# Samarth Sheth

I'm finishing an M.S. in Mathematics at UW–Madison, after studying Mathematics and Physics at UC Berkeley for my undergrad.

I’m interested in probability, markets, mathematical writing, and software that makes technical ideas easier to explore.


<!-- 
::: {.home-links}
[Projects](projects/index.qmd)  
[Writing](blog/index.qmd)  
[CV](cv.qmd)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/SamarthSheth)  
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/samarth-sheth/)  
[Email](mailto:samarth.sheth@hotmail.com)
:::

-->
:::

::: {.home-photo-wrap}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.home-photo}
:::


:::
